parameters.query: SELECT value_json FROM project_memory WHERE key = 'team_lead_last_msg_id' LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO project_memory (key, value_json) VALUES ('team_lead_last_msg_id', $1::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value_json = EXCLUDED.value_json, updated_at = now()

parameters.query: SELECT id, type, content_json, status, approver_discord_id, expires_at FROM drafts WHERE id = $1
SELECT id, type, content_json, status, approver_discord_id, expires_at FROM drafts WHERE id = $1
SELECT id, type, content_json, status, approver_discord_id, expires_at FROM drafts WHERE id = $1
UPDATE drafts SET status = 'approved' WHERE id = $1 AND status = 'pending' RETURNING id, type, content_json
UPDATE drafts SET status = 'rejected' WHERE id = $1 AND status = 'pending' RETURNING id
UPDATE drafts SET content_json = jsonb_set(content_json, '{text}', $2::jsonb), status = 'approved' WHERE id = $1 AND status = 'pending' RETURNING id, type, content_json

body.content: =Draft `{{ $node['Validate Draft (Reject)'].json.draft_id }}` rejected. Nothing has been sent. You can re-trigger a new draft at any time.

Available commands:
`!report` — Draft a new client progress report
`!approve <draft_id>` — Approve and deliver a pending draft
`!reject <draft_id>` — Reject a pending draft (nothing is sent)
`!edit <draft_id> <revised text>` — Replace draft text and approve for delivery
`!welcome` — Manually trigger client welcome draft
`!help` — Show this message
`!explain <action_id>` — Explain what the agent did and why
